original_statement: which team has at least 8 seasons played?
mutated_statement: which entity has at least 8 seasons played but fewer than 8 seasons played?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory numeric constraints: "team" → "entity" | added "but fewer than 8 seasons played" creating mutually exclusive conditions ("at least 8 seasons played" → "at least 8 seasons played but fewer than 8 seasons played")

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与chain中simple_query的thought，agent明确指出“at least 8”和“fewer than 8”互相矛盾，并直接给出结论为“none”。关键证据包括judge_thought中对矛盾性的陈述和对表中唯一8赛季球队不满足“少于8”的说明。agent的具体表现为：识别矛盾、不尝试通过折中执行或假设去满足矛盾条件，而是通过逻辑推理和数据检查说明在当前数据下没有满足条件的实体，并返回无结果。因为其核心行为是通过论证矛盾不可成立来合理化并解释为何不能给出正答案，故归类为“合理化矛盾指令”下的“逻辑解释合理化”。
